title: Trimble (TRMB) Teams Up With Meta to Launch SketchUp Viewer
text: Trimble (TRMB) partners with Meta to roll out SketchUp Viewer, offering Meta Quest users with presentation and preview of 3D architecture models.

title: Trimble Technology Lab for Architecture and Construction Opens at Virginia Tech
text: Trimble Technology Lab Sponsored by School of Architecture and Myers-Lawson School of Construction  WESTMINSTER, Colo. and BLACKSBURG, Va.

title: AGCO and Trimble announce JV aimed at boosting farming technology; shares rise
text: AGCO Corporation (NYSE:AGCO) has announced a joint venture (JV) with Trimble Navigation Limited (NASDAQ:TRMB) that will see it paying $2 billion to acquire an 85% interest in Trimble's agriculture technology business. AGCO will also contribute its JCA Technologies business to the JV.

title: TRMB Stock: The $3 BILLION Reason Trimble Is Up Today
text: Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB ) stock is heading higher on Thursday as investors react to a new agreement with AGCO (NYSE: AGCO ). The big news here that has shareholders of TRMB stock excited is the company forming a joint venture with AGCO.

title: AGCO to pay $2 billion in cash for most of Trimble's agricultural assets
text: Shares of Trimble Inc. TRMB, +0.10% rallied Thursday, after AGCO Corp. AGCO, +1.76% said it will pay $2.0 billion to acquire an 85% stake in the Trimble's portfolio of agricultural assets and technologies.

title: Trimble and AGCO to Form Joint Venture to Better Serve Farmers Worldwide with Mixed Fleet Precision Agriculture Solutions
text: Joint Venture to Accelerate Innovation in Factory-Fit and Aftermarket Solutions to Benefit Farmers Across the Globe Transaction to Simplify and Accelerate Trimble's Focus on its Connect and Scale Strategy WESTMINSTER, Colo. , Sept. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today a definitive agreement to form a joint venture (the "JV") with AGCO (NYSE: AGCO) to better serve farmers with factory fit and aftermarket applications in the mixed fleet precision agriculture market.

title: AGCO to Acquire Trimble Ag Assets and Technologies Through a Joint Venture Focused on Next-Generation Precision Ag Technology
text: DULUTH, Ga.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #AGCOIR--AGCO Corporation (NYSE: AGCO), a worldwide manufacturer and distributor of agricultural machinery and Precision Ag technology, announced it has entered into a Joint Venture (JV) with Trimble (Nasdaq: TRMB), where AGCO will acquire an 85% interest in Trimble's portfolio of Ag assets and technologies for cash consideration of $2.0 billion and the contribution of JCA Technologies. The JV creates a global leading mixed-fleet Precision Ag platform that will be the exclu.

title: Trimble and Meta Bring SketchUp to Meta Quest VR Headsets
text: An Immersive, Powerful Way to Present and Review 3D SketchUp Models  WESTMINSTER, Colo. , Sept. 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today the launch of SketchUp Viewer for Meta Quest 2, Meta Quest Pro and Meta Quest 3, a powerful, immersive way to view and present 3D SketchUp models in virtual reality (VR).

title: Trimble (TRMB) Boosts Geospatial Segment With New Partnership
text: Trimble (TRMB) teams up with Kyivstar to install a Continuously Operating Reference Station (CORS) network for GNSS correction services in Ukraine.

title: Trimble and Kyivstar Partner to Provide GNSS Correction Services for Agriculture, Construction and Geospatial Applications in Ukraine
text: Trimble Hardware and Software Selected for New GNSS Network  WESTMINSTER, Colo. , Sept. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) and Kyivstar, Ukraine's largest telecommunications company, are partnering to install a new Continuously Operating Reference Station (CORS) network to provide Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) correction services across the country.

title: Trimble Leaders Highlight the Unique 'Journeys' of the Supply Chain During Opening Session of its 2023 Insight Tech Conference + Expo
text: LAS VEGAS , Sept. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) opened its 2023 Insight Tech Conference + Expo with Trimble leaders Rob Painter, president and CEO, and Ron Bisio, senior vice president of Trimble's Transportation sector, talking about the challenging and transformative journeys in the transportation industry, the increased pace of change and their shared commitment to moving the industry forward.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Boosts Transportation Segment With New Solution
text: Trimble (TRMB) unveils Appian Daily Planner, a cloud-based solution for fleet owners, enhancing efficiency and asset utilization in multi-stop routes.

title: Purdue University to Launch Trimble Technology Lab with Focus on Construction Management Technology
text: Innovative Lab Opens in Purdue's New Technology Hub WESTMINSTER, Colo. and WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind.

title: Trimble: 10% Away From Its Initial 'Buy Zone'
text: Trimble Inc. is a technology solutions company that is focused on four high-growth sectors: resources and utilities, building and infrastructure, geospatial, and transportation. The company is nicely profitable, is delivering mid-single digit sales growth and is moving more to a higher-margin subscription-based model. Analysts have mixed opinions on Trimble's near-term prospects and the stock seems to have support about 10% below current trading levels.

title: Trimble Launches Cloud-Based Appian Daily Planner to Simplify Complex, Multi-Stop Routing
text: Route Optimization Tool Reduces Planning Time and Resources for Final and middle Mile-Focused Fleets WESTMINSTER, Colo. , Sept. 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) introduced today Appian Daily Planner, a cloud-based solution for multi-stop, multi-vehicle route optimization that improves asset utilization, on-time deliveries and customer service.
